detailed_task_instruction: Pick up the transparent brown-handled kettle from the restaurant bar and pour water into the cup on the table, then set the kettle down. Lift the water-filled cup and place it onto a tray, retreat slightly, clamp the tray to the table, and move to the aisle. Advance the tray, rotate toward the bar, and move to the bar to place the tray on the countertop. Pick up the glass from the tray, pull the water cup toward the plate, and set the water cup on the table next to the tray. Rotate the turntable toward the tray, retreat slightly, pick up the tray, and pull it toward the bar.

detailed_task_instruction: Pick up the golden transparent handle kettle from the restaurant bar and pour water into the cup on the table, then set the kettle down. Lift the water-filled cup and place it onto a tray, retreat slightly, clamp the tray to the table, and move to the aisle. Advance the tray, rotate toward the bar, and move to the bar to place the tray on the countertop. Pick up the glass from the tray, pull the water cup toward the plate, and set the water cup on the table next to the tray. Rotate the turntable toward the tray, retreat slightly, pick up the tray, and pull it toward the bar.

Advance the tray, rotate toward the bar, and move to the bar to place the tray on the countertop. Pick up the glass from the tray, pull the water cup toward the plate, and set the water cup on the table next to the tray. Rotate the turntable toward the tray, retreat slightly, pick up the tray, and pull it toward the bar.
